text.content:
Rolls

Most ability rolls are stress die + Characteristic + Ability (+1 specialty when it applies). Opposed actions compare totals; static tasks use an ease factor set by the storyguide.

Specialties

Record specialties in parentheses on the ability. When rolling, the sheet asks whether the specialty applies before adding +1.

Weapon Groups

This system also includes Single Weapon, Great Weapon, Bow, Thrown Weapon, and Crossbow so LoM/ArM5 gear can link to combat totals. Classic 2e still allows per-weapon attack/parry skills via the weapon’s Attack/Parry Skill fields when Ability is blank.

Ability Types

Talents — innate or intuitive capabilities (raised mainly by adventure experience).

Skills — trained capabilities.

Knowledges — learned information and lore.

Open ability Items from the Abilities pack for full 2e blurbs. Parenthetical abilities (Craft, Area Lore, Speak, Scribe, Play Instrument) use the specialty field to name the specific focus.
